phrases.english: I enjoy reading books in my free time.
phrases.arabic: أستمتع بقراءة الكتب في وقت فراغي.
phrases.pronunciation: Astamti' bi qira'ati al-kutubi fi waqti faraaghi.
phrases.context: Use this to talk about your hobby of reading.

phrases.english: My favorite hobby is playing football with my friends.
phrases.arabic: هوايتي المفضلة هي لعب كرة القدم مع أصدقائي.
phrases.pronunciation: Hawayati al-mufaddalah hiya la'ibu kurati al-qadami ma'a asdiqa'i.
phrases.context: Share your main hobby, specifically playing football.

phrases.english: I love to travel to new places and explore different cultures.
phrases.arabic: أحب السفر إلى أماكن جديدة واستكشاف ثقافات مختلفة.
phrases.pronunciation: Uhibbu as-safara ila amakinin jadidatin wa istikshafi thaqafatin mukhtalifah.
phrases.context: Describe your passion for travel and cultural exploration.

phrases.english: On weekends, I usually go hiking in the mountains.
phrases.arabic: في عطلات نهاية الأسبوع، أذهب عادةً للتنزه في الجبال.
phrases.pronunciation: Fi 'utlati nihayati al-usbu', adhhabu 'aadatan lit-tanazzuhi fil-jibaal.
phrases.context: Explain your typical weekend activity of hiking.

phrases.english: I spend my evenings learning to play the guitar.
phrases.arabic: أقضي أمسياتي في تعلم العزف على الجيتار.
phrases.pronunciation: Aqdi umsiyati fi ta'allumi al-'azfi 'ala al-jitaar.
phrases.context: Talk about your evening hobby of learning the guitar.
